## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change that solves it.

## Validation

- [ ] `gofmt -l .` returns no files
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior changes
- [ ] No credentials, generated databases, or private prompt data are included

## Compatibility

Describe any API, configuration, provider, storage, or deployment impact.

## Screenshots

Include screenshots only for user-interface changes.
